fields.label: Scan Root Directory
fields.description: Root directory to scan for files (e.g. /, /home/user)

fields.label: Ignored Directories
fields.description: Comma-separated list of root-level directories to ignore during indexing

fields.label: Re-indexing Interval
fields.description: How often the file search database automatically re-indexes (in hours)

fields.label: Search Results Limit
fields.description: Maximum number of search results to return in the list
